1 The Negros Island Region (NIR) was abolished through Executive Order No. 38
– “Revoking Executive Order No. 183 (s. 2015) which Created a Negros Island Region and for Other Purposes”,
signed by President Rodrigo Roa Duterte on August 7, 2017. The abolition of NIR reverted the provinces, cities, municipalities,
and barangays of Negros Occidental and City of Bacolod to Region VI (Western Visayas).

– “Revoking Executive Order No. 183 (s. 2015) which Created a Negros Island Region and for Other Purposes”,

and barangays of Negros Oriental to Region VII (Central Visayas).
